summary: 11 film announcements, 13 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Conjuring: First Communion
film.announcement: Matthias Schweighöfer joins the cast of New Line's upcoming Conjuring film.

film.title: Son of the Mob
film.announcement: The filmmaking duo behind The Kissing Booth is tackling the YA rom-com adaptation of Son of the Mob.

film.title: Lizard Music
film.talent: Theo Clark Leber (lead), Dwayne Johnson, director Benny Safdie
film.announcement: 10-year-old Theo Clark Leber lands the lead role opposite Dwayne Johnson in Benny Safdie's Lizard Music.

film.title: Positano
film.talent: Toni Collette, Karren Karagulian, director Daniel Roher
film.announcement: Toni Collette and Karren Karagulian join Netflix's Italian-set romantic caper Positano directed by Daniel Roher.

film.title: Ally
film.talent: Bradley Cooper, Ayo Edebiri, director Bong Joon Ho
film.announcement: Bong Joon Ho's first animated feature Ally, with voice cast including Bradley Cooper and Ayo Edebiri, sells globally through Pathé.

film.title: Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher Biopic
film.announcement: Director Deon Taylor will helm a biopic on streetball star Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher for Hidden Empire Sports.

film.title: The Two Week Wait
film.talent: Daniel Ings, Jessica Brown Findlay, director Olivia Grant
film.announcement: Daniel Ings and Jessica Brown Findlay star in Olivia Grant's directorial debut short film The Two Week Wait.

film.title: Onwards and Sideways
film.talent: Laura Linney, Rhys Ifans, director John Madden
film.announcement: John Madden directs Onwards and Sideways featuring Laura Linney and Rhys Ifans as people being diagnosed with Parkinson's, heading to Toronto Film Festival.

film.title: Bad Karaoke
film.announcement: Horror-comedy Bad Karaoke debuts its trailer ahead of Tubi FrightFest premiere.

film.title: The Portrait of a Lady
film.talent: Bill Nighy, Gemma Arterton, Nell Tiger Free
film.announcement: Bill Nighy, Gemma Arterton, and Nell Tiger Free are set for the PBS and BBC adaptation of The Portrait of a Lady.

film.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
film.announcement: The Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender film sequel to the beloved animated series releases with reviews noting dazzling visuals but lackluster storytelling.

tv.title: Scrubs
tv.talent: Ava Bunn (series regular), X Mayo (departing), Joel Kim Booster (departing)
tv.announcement: Ava Bunn is promoted to series regular for Season 2 of the Scrubs revival, while X Mayo and Joel Kim Booster exit the series.

tv.title: Conviction
tv.announcement: Liza Colon-Zayas joins the cast of Hulu's David Shore legal drama Conviction.

tv.title: Myron Bolitar
tv.talent: Chloe Fineman, Jabari Banks, Jamie McShane, Ben McKenzie
tv.announcement: Chloe Fineman joins Netflix's Myron Bolitar series following her SNL exit, alongside Jabari Banks, Jamie McShane, and Ben McKenzie.

tv.title: Afterlife with Archie
tv.announcement: Disney+ greenlights the Afterlife with Archie series based on the comic with the Riverdale team attached, set for Halloween 2027 premiere.

tv.title: Guilty Creatures
tv.talent: Julia Garner, Lewis Pullman, Tomorrow Studios
tv.announcement: Lewis Pullman joins Julia Garner in Apple TV+'s thriller series Guilty Creatures from Tomorrow Studios.

tv.title: The Earliest Show
tv.talent: Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, Brandon Scott Jones
tv.announcement: The Earliest Show revival is greenlit at Amplify Pictures with Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, and Brandon Scott Jones joining the cast.

tv.title: Happy Hour
tv.announcement: Kelsey Cook sets her Netflix stand-up special Happy Hour.

tv.title: A Different World
tv.announcement: Netflix's A Different World revival brings back Dwayne Wayne for Season 1.

tv.title: John Carter of Mars
tv.announcement: Oscar winner Mark Andrews boards the John Carter of Mars animated series.

tv.title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians
tv.announcement: Season 3 of Percy Jackson and the Olympians is in development with series details emerging.

tv.title: My Life with the Walter Boys
tv.announcement: Season 3 of Netflix's My Life with the Walter Boys is in development with series updates emerging.

tv.title: Interview with the Vampire
tv.announcement: Season 3 finale of Interview with the Vampire concludes with Lestat reveal and new details on the series' direction.

tv.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv.announcement: Limited edition DC comic book and experiential space planned for Stuart Fails to Save the Universe at San Diego Comic-Con.
